chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SSTRA 125 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.4 & 25 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.2529/2024 13.11.2025 Mr. Ghulam Nabi Shar, advocate for the applicant Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, advocate for respondent On 09.10.2025, following order was passed: “Per learned counsel, the impugned order prima facie is devoid of any independent deliberation and/or reasoning. Learned counsel states that the order is entirely comprised of reproduction and a dissonant conclusion, which cannot be considered as a speaking order, hence, merits interference” Today learned counsel for respondent is present and states that in view of the foregoing it may be just and proper for the impugned order to be set aside and the matter be remanded back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
